structured_fields.name: approved_drugs
structured_fields.description: Approved drug therapies for this disease — each with key clinical properties

example.name: Hydroxychloroquine
example.mechanism: Inhibits toll-like receptor signalling and reduces interferon production

example.name: Belimumab
example.mechanism: Inhibits B-lymphocyte stimulator reducing autoantibody producing B cells

freetext_fields.name: standard_of_care_narrative
freetext_fields.description: Narrative describing the current standard of care — how treatment decisions are made, sequencing of therapies and overall treatment philosophy

freetext_fields.name: non_pharmacologic_interventions
freetext_fields.description: Narrative on surgical, lifestyle or non-pharmacologic interventions that play a role in disease management

freetext_fields.name: treatment_guidelines_narrative
freetext_fields.description: Narrative referencing key treatment guidelines — which bodies published them, what they recommend and any recent updates

freetext_fields.name: unmet_needs_narrative
freetext_fields.description: Candid narrative on unmet medical needs — what current treatments fail to address, which patient populations are underserved and where clinical gaps remain

prompt_hints.tone: clinical and evidence-based — reference treatment guidelines where relevant
avoid: generic unmet needs statements without disease-specific grounding
prefer: connecting drug mechanisms to disease pathophysiology already established
acknowledging where treatment response varies across patient subgroups
unmet needs narrative that is specific and commercially relevant
